title: §24 system viz
manager: System visualization — render a whole system as a diagram with member clusters, ×N population badges, route edges, and a dead-letter sink — so a system is as inspectable at a glance as a single machine is. Visualizing composition is what keeps large systems comprehensible; without it, a five-hundred-machine system is an opaque blob instead of a picture you can actually reason about and debug.
cs: §24 system viz; member clusters, ×N population badges, route edges, dead-letter sink; the system-scale counterpart to single-machine rendering.
